<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests\Models; /** * Class PostWithIncludeTrashed. * * A test model that uses the Sluggable package and "includeTrashed", * but does not use Laravel's SoftDeleting trait. */ class PostWithIncludeTrashed extends Post { public function sluggable(): array { return [ 'slug' => [ 'source' => 'title', 'includeTrashed' => true, ], ]; } }
